name: Claude Code Bridge

releases.author: Radical7VII
releases.description:
## 修复

- 打开/切换文件时立即推送活动文件信息（监听 `active-leaf-change` 和 `file-open` 事件），对齐 VS Code 扩展行为。此前打开文件无选中时不显示，必须手动选中文字才有反应。

## 其他

- 修正 README 中指向错误仓库的 clone 链接

releases.author: Radical7VII
releases.description:
## Initial Release

Bridge selected text in Obsidian to Claude Code CLI in real-time.

### Features
- Real-time selection sync via WebSocket (MCP protocol)
- Auto-discovery by Claude Code CLI through lock file
- Debounced selection detection with deduplication
- Single-client connection management

### Installation
Download `main.js` and `manifest.json`, place them in your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/claude-code-bridge/` directory.
releases.name: v0.1.0
